meta.denomination: USDC at 1:1 (PWRD is a USD stablecoin redeemable ~1.0 USDC via Gro's withdraw handler). USDC_raw = unclaimed_PWRD_raw / 1e12.
meta.note: 2-step recovery: (1) claim PWRD from the vestor — initialClaim(proof, amount) for never-claimed, claim() for partial; vesting ended 2024-05-31 so the full remaining allocation pays out in one tx. (2) optionally redeem PWRD → USDC via the Gro withdraw handler (still live).

description: Gro Protocol UST-compensation vesting. Addresses affected by the May-2022 UST/Terra depeg were compensated in PWRD (Gro's USD stablecoin) on a 2-year merkle vesting schedule that ended 2024-05-31. Everyone can now claim their full remaining allocation. PWRD is redeemable ~1:1 to USDC, which is what the v2 hero counter tracks here.
